final_prompt.prompt:
Design an original, non-infringing travel brochure for a 4-day 3-night Hangzhou itinerary.

Style/medium: trifold brochure, real Hangzhou map as background, suspended on cardstock
Composition: tri-fold layout with floating landmarks
Subject: 4-day Hangzhou travel guide with famous scenic spots as location markers
Scene/backdrop: Hangzhou city map background with iconic landmarks floating above cardstock
Lighting/mood: 
Color palette: 
Materials/textures: cardstock base with floating landmark elements
Text (verbatim): "第一天：西湖经典游，打卡教科书里的江南" "断桥残雪→白堤→孤山→曲院风荷→苏堤春晓→花港观鱼→雷峰塔→柳浪闻莺" "第二天：禅意杭州，穿越千年宋韵" "灵隐寺→飞来峰造像→法喜寺→宋城" "第三天：九溪烟树徒步，做一日茶山散人" "九溪十八涧→龙井村→十里琅珰→云栖竹径" "第四天：文艺收官，解锁杭州AB面"
Constraints: real Hangzhou map as main visual thread, famous landmarks must have distinctive landmark features
Avoid:
